content.text: I found your Q3 roadmap, project status, and team docs — I'll pull those together into a tight 90-minute agenda.

content.content:
Project Helios — Q3 Roadmap
INTERNAL DRAFT — Not for client distribution
Last updated: 2026-07-06

Q3 2026 Priorities:

1. COMPLETE SYSTEM INTEGRATION (July)
   - Finalize data ingestion module (target: 2026-07-18)
   - Complete client dashboard v1 (target: 2026-07-22)
   - Integration test sign-off (target: 2026-07-25)

2. PRODUCT DEMO FOR MERIDIAN (July 25)
   - Live data ingestion demonstration using Meridian sample data
   - End-to-end pipeline walkthrough
   - Dashboard visualization with real data (per contract Section 9.3)

3. USER ACCEPTANCE TESTING — MERIDIAN GROUP (August 17-28)
   - Deploy to UAT environment
   - Support Meridian user testing sessions
   - Address UAT feedback (budget: 2 sprints)

4. PERFORMANCE HARDENING (August-September)
   - Dashboard load time target: <2 seconds for 100k records
   - Ingestion throughput benchmarking (target: 500k records/min sustained)
   - External security penetration test (vendor TBD)

5. LAUNCH PREPARATION (September)
   - Production environment setup and runbook documentation
   - Hypercare plan finalization (30-day post-launch model)
   - Final client training sessions

Target launch date: 2026-10-01
Key risk: UAT slippage of >2 weeks pushes launch into Q4, triggering Section 7.1 penalty review.

Proposed Q3 feature additions (subject to change control approval):
- Scheduled ingestion jobs (cron-based triggers)
- Email alerting for pipeline failures
- Self-service mapping rule editor (deferred from Q2)

Project Helios — Weekly Status Update
Week of 2026-07-06

Overall: ON TRACK (minor risks)

Milestone Progress:
- Data ingestion module: 85% complete
- API gateway: 100% complete (delivered)
- Client dashboard: 60% complete
- Integration testing: 40% complete

Sprint 14 Goals:
- Complete dashboard module v1
- Resolve data format inconsistencies (Blocker #1)
- Begin UAT preparation

Open Blockers:
1. Meridian source data contains inconsistent date formats (ISO 8601 vs. MM/DD/YYYY).
   Dev team awaiting clarification from Meridian IT. Estimated delay: 2-3 days.
2. Third-party mapping library (GeoSync v2.1) license renewal pending. Legal reviewing.
   Target resolution: 2026-07-14.

Next milestone: Integration Test Sign-off — target 2026-07-25

Project Helios — Q2 Deliverables Checklist

[DONE]      Requirements documentation v1.0
[DONE]      System architecture design
[DONE]      API gateway implementation
[DONE]      Development environment setup
[DONE]      Data schema finalization
[IN-PROGRESS] Data ingestion module (target: 2026-07-18)
[IN-PROGRESS] Client dashboard v1 (target: 2026-07-22)
[OVERDUE]   Integration test suite setup (was due 2026-06-30; rescheduled to 2026-07-20)
[OVERDUE]   UAT environment provisioning (was due 2026-07-01; blocked by Meridian IT access)
[OVERDUE]   Performance benchmarking report (was due 2026-07-05; owner: Derek Okafor)

Project Helios — Team Roster

Name: Sarah Chen        | Title: Project Manager       | Email: s.chen@novabridge.com
Name: Derek Okafor      | Title: Technical Lead         | Email: d.okafor@novabridge.com
Name: Amir Hassan       | Title: Senior Backend Engineer| Email: a.hassan@novabridge.com
Name: Liu Wei           | Title: Backend Engineer       | Email: l.wei@novabridge.com
Name: Fatima Al-Rashid  | Title: Frontend Engineer      | Email: f.alrashid@novabridge.com
Name: Tomas Rivera      | Title: Frontend Engineer      | Email: t.rivera@novabridge.com
Name: Kenji Watanabe    | Title: QA Engineer            | Email: k.watanabe@novabridge.com
Name: Nadia Petrov      | Title: DevOps Engineer        | Email: n.petrov@novabridge.com
Name: Marcus Green      | Title: Data Engineer          | Email: m.green@novabridge.com
Name: Isabelle Dupont   | Title: UX Designer            | Email: i.dupont@novabridge.com
Name: Raj Patel         | Title: Business Analyst       | Email: r.patel@novabridge.com
Name: Olivia Brooks     | Title: Solutions Architect    | Email: o.brooks@novabridge.com

Meeting Notes: Project Helios / Meridian Group Sync
Date: 2026-07-08
Attendees: Sarah Chen (NovaBridge PM), Derek Okafor (NovaBridge Tech Lead),
           Priya Kapoor (Meridian IT Lead), James Whitfield (Meridian Project Sponsor)

Decisions:
1. Demo date confirmed: 2026-07-25 (product demo for Meridian stakeholders)
2. Meridian will provide clean sample dataset by 2026-07-15 to unblock date format issue
3. UAT period extended by 1 week (now Aug 17-28)

Action Items:
- NovaBridge: Resolve GeoSync license before demo (owner: Derek Okafor, due 2026-07-14)
- NovaBridge: Send draft demo agenda to Meridian by 2026-07-18 (owner: Sarah Chen)
- Meridian: Share IT infrastructure diagram for integration environment setup
  (owner: Priya Kapoor, due 2026-07-12)

Notes:
- James Whitfield emphasized that the demo must include live data ingestion, not mock data.
- Concern raised about dashboard load times on large datasets. Derek to benchmark before demo.
- Priya Kapoor confirmed Meridian IT will provision UAT environment access by 2026-07-19.

Project Helios — Risk Register
Last reviewed: 2026-07-07 | Owner: Sarah Chen (PM)

ID    Risk Description                             Likelihood  Impact  Score  Mitigation Owner    Status
----  -------------------------------------------  ----------  ------  -----  ------------------  --------
R-01  Meridian source data quality issues           High        High    9      Amir Hassan         Active — date format blocker confirmed in sprint 14
R-02  GeoSync license not renewed before demo       Medium      High    6      Raj Patel           Active — legal review in progress, due 2026-07-14
R-03  Dashboard performance on large datasets       Medium      High    6      Derek Okafor        Active — benchmark task HEL-247 not yet started
R-04  UAT timeline slippage                        High        Medium  6      Sarah Chen          Active — 1-week extension already consumed
R-05  Key person dependency: Derek Okafor           Low         High    3      Sarah Chen          Monitored — no backup tech lead identified
R-06  Meridian IT environment access delays        Medium      Medium  4      Nadia Petrov        Active — awaiting IT infrastructure diagram
R-07  Scope creep from Meridian feature requests   Low         Medium  2      Raj Patel           Monitored — 3 informal requests logged, not yet escalated
R-08  Cloud cost overrun                           Low         Low     1      Nadia Petrov        Monitored
R-09  Third-party API deprecation (non-GeoSync)    Very Low    Medium  1      Olivia Brooks       Monitored

Project Helios — Architecture Overview

System Components:

1. Data Ingestion Layer
   Accepts source data via REST API or SFTP. Handles CSV, JSON, and XML formats.
   Supports batch and streaming modes. Built-in format validation and schema enforcement.

2. Transformation Engine
   Applies client-defined mapping rules. Built on Apache Spark.
   Processes up to 500k records/minute. Configurable via YAML rule files.

3. API Gateway
   RESTful interface for downstream consumers. Auth via OAuth 2.0.
   Rate-limited at 1,000 req/min per client. Version-pinned endpoints (v1 stable).

4. Client Dashboard
   React-based web interface. Real-time pipeline monitoring and alerting.
   Role-based access control (admin / analyst / read-only).

5. Data Store
   PostgreSQL (operational data) + S3-compatible object storage (raw file archive).
   Multi-tenant isolation via schema-level separation.

Integration Points:
- Meridian ERP system (inbound data via REST)
- Meridian reporting platform (outbound via webhook)
- NovaBridge internal monitoring stack

Key Design Decisions:
- Stateless processing nodes for horizontal scalability
- End-to-end encryption: TLS 1.3 in transit, AES-256 at rest
- All PII handled under GDPR-compliant data minimization policy

content.text: I've got the context on priorities, blockers, and the July 25 demo — now I'll build your 90-minute agenda and save it.

input.content:
Project Helios — Q3 Kickoff Meeting Agenda
Duration: 90 minutes
Facilitator: Sarah Chen (Project Manager)
Attendees: Project Helios Core Team (Engineering, QA, DevOps, Design, BA, PM)

Meeting Objective:
Align the full team on Q3 priorities, timeline to Oct 1 launch, critical blockers, and ownership before Q3 execution begins.

Pre-Read (please review before meeting):
- q3_roadmap_draft.txt (updated 2026-07-06)
- project_helios_status.txt (week of 2026-07-06)
- meeting_notes_2026_07_08.txt — Meridian sync / demo confirmation
- risk_register.txt — active risks as of 2026-07-07

---
AGENDA

1. Welcome & Meeting Goals (0:00 - 0:05) — 5 min | Owner: Sarah Chen
   - Purpose of Q3 kickoff, expected outcomes, ground rules

2. Q2 Recap & Current State (0:05 - 0:15) — 10 min | Owner: Sarah Chen / Derek Okafor
   - Done: Requirements, architecture, API gateway (100%), dev env, data schema
   - In Progress: Data ingestion 85%, Client dashboard 60%, Integration testing 40%
   - Overdue / Carried into Q3:
     * Integration test suite setup (rescheduled to 2026-07-20)
     * UAT environment provisioning (blocked pending Meridian IT access, target 2026-07-19)
     * Performance benchmarking report (owner: Derek Okafor)
   - Key learnings from Q2

3. Q3 Roadmap & Timeline to Launch (0:15 - 0:35) — 20 min | Owner: Sarah Chen
   - Walk through 5 Q3 priorities:
     a) Complete System Integration — July (ingestion by 7/18, dashboard v1 by 7/22, integration sign-off 7/25)
     b) Product Demo for Meridian — July 25 (live data ingestion required, no mock data)
     c) User Acceptance Testing — Aug 17-28 (deploy to UAT, support sessions, 2-sprint buffer for feedback)
     d) Performance Hardening — Aug-Sep (dashboard <2s for 100k records, 500k records/min ingestion, external pen test)
     e) Launch Prep — Sep (prod setup, runbook, hypercare plan, final training)
   - Target launch: 2026-10-01
   - Risk note: UAT slippage >2 weeks triggers launch delay into Q4 and Section 7.1 penalty review

4. July Critical Path — Integration & Demo Readiness (0:35 - 0:50) — 15 min | Owner: Derek Okafor
   - Data ingestion module: remaining 15%, format validation handling
   - Blocker #1: Meridian source data inconsistent date formats (ISO 8601 vs MM/DD/YYYY) — waiting on clean sample dataset from Meridian by 7/15 (owner: Priya Kapoor)
   - Client dashboard v1: remaining 40%, React pipeline monitoring + RBAC
   - Blocker #2: GeoSync v2.1 license renewal — Legal review, must resolve by 7/14 (owner: Derek / Raj Patel)
   - Integration test sign-off prep and Sprint 14 goals
   - Demo requirements per contract Section 9.3: live ingestion with Meridian sample data, end-to-end walkthrough, real dashboard visualization
   - Action: Draft demo agenda to Meridian by 7/18 (owner: Sarah Chen)

5. UAT Planning (0:50 - 1:05) — 15 min | Owner: Nadia Petrov / Kenji Watanabe / Raj Patel
   - UAT environment status and dependency on Meridian IT infrastructure diagram (due 7/12) and access (target 7/19)
   - Scope for Aug 17-28: deployment plan, test scenarios, support model
   - Handling of scope creep — 3 informal feature requests logged (email alerting, scheduled jobs, self-service mapping editor) — change control process
   - Roles during UAT: QA lead, Dev on-call, PM coordination

6. Performance Hardenings, Security & Launch Prep (1:05 - 1:15) — 10 min | Owner: Derek Okafor / Nadia Petrov / Olivia Brooks
   - Performance targets: benchmark plan for dashboard load and ingestion throughput (HEL-247 still not started)
   - External security pen test — vendor selection TBD
   - Production readiness: environment setup, monitoring integration, runbook documentation, hypercare 30-day model
   - Architecture guardrails: stateless nodes, TLS 1.3 / AES-256, GDPR data minimization, rate limiting

7. Risks, Dependencies & Mitigations (1:15 - 1:25) — 10 min | Owner: Sarah Chen
   - Top risks review:
     R-01 Data quality — High/High — Amir Hassan — Mitigation: clean sample set + robust parsing
     R-02 GeoSync license — Med/High — Raj Patel — Mitigation: escalate legal, backup plan
     R-03 Dashboard performance — Med/High — Derek Okafor — Mitigation: early benchmarking
     R-04 UAT slippage — High/Med — Sarah Chen — Extension already consumed, buffer planning
     R-06 Meridian IT access delays — Nadia Petrov
     R-05 Key person dependency: Tech Lead — need backup identification
   - Open dependencies and owners

8. Team Ownership, Ways of Working & Next Steps (1:25 - 1:30) — 5 min | Owner: Sarah Chen
   - Confirm owners for Q3 deliverables, on-call rotation, and decision-making
   - Meeting cadence for Q3: weekly status, demo rehearsals week of 7/21
   - Q&A
   - Capture action items and communication plan to Meridian

---
Action Items Parking Lot (to capture in meeting):
- [ ] Confirm resolution of GeoSync license by 7/14
- [ ] Receive Meridian sample data & infra diagram
- [ ] Assign benchmark owner for HEL-247
- [ ] Draft & send demo agenda to Meridian by 7/18
- [ ] Finalize hypercare plan outline

Post-Meeting Deliverable: Updated project plan and risk register, shared notes within 24h.

content.text:
I've created your 90-minute Q3 kickoff agenda and saved it as **q3_kickoff_agenda.txt**.

The agenda is built from your current docs (Q3 roadmap, status update, Meridian sync notes 07/08, risk register, and team roster) and covers:

1.  **Welcome & Goals** (5 min)
2.  **Q2 Recap & Current State** (10 min) - Done / In-progress / Overdue items
3.  **Q3 Roadmap to Oct 1 Launch** (20 min) - 5 priorities + Section 7.1 risk if UAT slips
4.  **July Critical Path: Integration & Demo Readiness** (15 min) - 7/18 ingestion, 7/22 dashboard, 7/25 live demo requirement, blockers #1 & #2
5.  **UAT Planning** (15 min) - Aug 17-28 deployment, environment dependencies (7/12 diagram, 7/19 access), change control for feature requests
6.  **Performance, Security & Launch Prep** (10 min) - <2s dashboard, 500k rec/min, pen test, prod runbook/hypercare
7.  **Risks & Dependencies** (10 min) - R-01 to R-06 with owners
8.  **Ownership & Next Steps** (5 min)

It also includes pre-reads, facilitators/owners (Sarah Chen & Derek Okafor leading), and a parking lot for action items like GeoSync renewal by 7/14 and demo agenda to Meridian by 7/18.
